jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Fleet Manager at Safexpress
jsonLd.description:
Join the Safexpress family as a Fleet Manager in Howrah. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Safexpress:
Safexpress is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics
• Proficiency in Inventory Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Safexpress!
